meaning: n.拟寄生物(尤指胡蜂)adj.拟寄生物的
examples: In addition, pest oviposition-induced plant cues can arrest parasitoid wasps during host location.
The host mortality after exposure were decreased with increase of the host age at exposure to the parasitoid.
Three factors: the age of female parasitoid density of the host, and density of the female parasitoid were studied.
